text_excerpt: In Parliament - Michael Wheeler Skip to main content Michael Wheeler Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles Join Get Involved Donate About Michael How Can I Help You Personal Casework Contact Me My Work In Worsley & Eccles Constituency Surgery Information Upcoming Events Latest News In Parliament Committees APPGs Visiting Parliament More Search Search the website Search Menu In Parliament I work hard to represent the views of my constituents in Parliament. Below you’ll find a selection of my recent contributions in the House of Commons and other important forums where I’ve been working on behalf of our community.
